creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #5)

As you stated in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=258476#c5 adding DIST_SUBDIR to both bazarr and bazarr-devel would also fix it. In a later comment there I also link and copy the reason why upstream wont create release assets with version number in the filename.

Also, https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=258511 is making this one obsolete.
